CustomObject.label: Onboarding Progress
CustomObject.description: Per-user per-track runtime state for the Checkr-style gated onboarding tracks (Layer 5 of the DH cockpit architecture). One record per user per track captures lesson completion, quiz attempts and score, checklist attestations, and walkthrough scheduling. PR 3 ships the schema, reader, quiz, and Invoice_Generation track; PR 4 wires the gate that refuses non-admin feature flips until the matching track is complete.
